log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Dhampir — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 171/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 171/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Dhampir — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Dhampir — Bardic Musician --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
